task.description: What to implement (e.g. 'add a CLI command that prints the loop schema')

implement.description: Implementer agent. Produces a JSON {code, summary}. On second+ iterations, picks up `${reviewDecision.previous.comment}` from the prior reject as guidance.

review.description: Reviewer agent. Produces preview (shown on approval card) + summary (full feedback). Stays a separate node from reviewDecision so reviewDecision's humanGate.before can $ref this output (designed in /tmp/wf-loop-v02.md §3.1 — humanGate.before cannot read same-node output).

reviewDecision.description: Loop terminator. Pure humanGate — approve closes the loop, reject opens iteration N+1 with the comment feeding back into `implement.prompt`.

review-loop.description: Wraps implement → review → reviewDecision into a reject-revisit loop. maxIterations=3 is the safe-by-default cap; bump for harder tasks.
